_meta.source: PSA Q4 2024 PSGC release, mirrored via https://psgc.gitlab.io/api/

schema.province: 4-digit province code, or null for Highly Urbanized Cities + NCR cities not under any province

notes: Derived from the current 9-digit PSGC by stripping trailing 000 barangay positions.
province: null indicates an HUC (Highly Urbanized City) or NCR city not nested under any province. Look up by region instead.
isCity vs isMunicipality is mutually exclusive in PSA classification.

cities_municipalities.name: City of San Jose Del Monte
